+title: Update RoutedSessionActor to own and drive a LanguageModelSessionBackend
+---
+## What
+
+`RoutedSessionActor` must hold the `LanguageModelSessionBackend` as actor-isolated state for its lifetime. Generation calls and fork creation go through the backend, not the container directly.
+
+**Modify** `Sources/FoundationModelsRouter/Session/RoutedSession.swift`:
+- Replace `private nonisolated let container: any LoadedLLMContainer` with `private nonisolated let backend: any LanguageModelSessionBackend`
+- Remove `private nonisolated let cache: any SessionKVCache` — the backend owns session state now
+- Update `respond(to:maxTokens:)` chokepoint: calls `backend.respond(to:maxTokens:)` instead of `container.respond(to:instructions:maxTokens:)` — note `instructions` is now baked into the backend at construction time, not passed per-call
+- Update `streamGenerating(_:maxTokens:into:)`: calls `backend.streamResponse(to:maxTokens:)`
+- Update the guided path in `respond(to:maxTokens:)`: calls `backend.respond(to:following:maxTokens:)`
+- Update `fork(workingDirectory:)`: calls `backend.makeFork(instructions: instructions, grammar: grammar)` to get the child's backend, then constructs the child `RoutedSessionActor` with that backend
+
+**Modify** `Sources/FoundationModelsRouter/RoutedLLM.swift` — `makeSession(grammar:instructions:workingDirectory:)`:
+- Call `container.makeSession(instructions: instructions)` to get the backend
+- Pass `backend:` to `RoutedSessionActor` init instead of `container:` and `cache:`
+- Remove the `cache: container.makeCache()` call
+
+**Update** `RoutedSessionActor.init(...)` signature to accept `backend: any LanguageModelSessionBackend` in place of `container:` + `cache:`.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `RoutedSessionActor` holds `backend: any LanguageModelSessionBackend`, not `container`
+- [ ] `fork()` calls `backend.makeFork(instructions:grammar:)` — child gets a backend seeded from parent's transcript
+- [ ] `instructions` are no longer passed per generation call (baked into the backend at `makeSession` time)
+- [ ] Package compiles; existing unit tests pass once stubs are updated (next task)
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] All existing `SessionChokepointTests` pass (after stub update task runs)
+- [ ] All existing `ForkConcurrencyTests` pass
+- [ ] All existing `TranscriptNestingTests` pass
+- [ ] `swift test` exits 0
+
+## Workflow
+- `/tdd` — make the failing tests visible first by updating the actor, then fix stubs in parallel with the next task.
\ No newline at end of file

+
+    So today's concrete implementation never actually throws anything — added a `- Throws:` line documenting that honestly rather than inventing a throw path that doesn't exist: it says nothing throws today, and explains the `async throws` signature exists to match `RoutedSession`'s other generation entry points and leave room for a future conforming backend whose fork can fail.
